mapper.select: SELECT h.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.price AS price, 0 AS sales, md.drug_category AS drugCategory, img.image_url AS coverImage, h.view_count AS viewCount, h.first_view_time AS firstViewTime, h.last_view_time AS lastViewTime FROM mall_product_view_history h LEFT JOIN mall_product p ON h.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN drug_detail md ON h.product_id = md.product_id AND (md.is_deleted = 0) LEFT JOIN (SELECT product_id, MIN(image_url) AS image_url FROM mall_product_image WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY product_id) img ON img.product_id = h.product_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY h.last_view_time DESC, h.id DESC
